title: data-cn error envelope
description: Structured error sentinels emitted in place of a payload slot when an underlying client (yfinance / nbs / akshare / fred) fails. pack.py exits 0 (partial-failure semantics); consumers detect failure by presence of _error key. Covers three sub-shapes: client_error (subprocess failed), invalid_json (stdout not parseable), and ticker_normalization_warnings (stderr-only metadata; not part of JSON output but documented here for completeness).

clientError.title: Client subprocess failure
clientError.description: Emitted when a client script exits with non-zero rc and empty stdout. Replaces the payload slot (e.g. yfinance_info) entirely.

_error.description: Human-readable error tag, e.g. 'client exited rc=1' or 'command not found: ...'.

invalidJson.title: Invalid JSON from client
invalidJson.description: Emitted when client returns rc=0 but stdout is not parseable JSON.

_stdout_head.description: First 500 bytes of client stdout for diagnostics.

timeoutError.title: Subprocess timeout
timeoutError.description: Reserved shape — pack.py does not currently set a subprocess timeout, but downstream wrappers may. Aligned with data-us contract.

batchTickerError.title: Per-ticker error inside a batch payload
batchTickerError.description: When a single ticker fails inside yfinance batch mode, the ticker entry inside `tickers: {}` carries `_error` and `_summary[ticker]` is set to a non-'ok' string. The batch envelope itself remains a normal batchInfo / batchHistory shape with `_partial: true`.

ticker_normalization_warnings.description: STDERR-only — NOT part of JSON output. Documented here for orchestrators that capture stderr alongside stdout. Two warning classes: (a) BSE ticker detected (6-digit /4,8) — yfinance does not cover Beijing Stock Exchange; pack will likely fail. (b) Unrecognized CN ticker format — passed through unchanged. Both pass through unchanged so downstream yfinance failure propagates as a batchTickerError.
examples: WARNING: BSE ticker '430123' detected — yfinance does not cover Beijing Stock Exchange (北京证券交易所); pack will likely fail.
WARNING: Unrecognized CN ticker format: '12345678' (expected 4-digit HK / 5-digit HK / 6-digit SSE/SZSE).
